name: golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev
summary: low-level toolkit building messages in the PostgreSQL wire protocol
description:
low-level toolkit building messages in the PostgreSQL wire protocol
Package pgio is a low-level toolkit building messages in the PostgreSQL wire
protocol.
.
pgio provides functions for appending integers to a []byte while doing
byte order conversion.
.
Extracted from original implementation in (https://github.com/jackc/pgx).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev because low-level toolkit building messages in the PostgreSQL wire protocol.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgio-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
